g++ -std=c++17 -O3  -O3 -DNDEBUG -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=26.1 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/wumpus.dir/Users/taros/Documents/DE424MP/src/wumpus.cc.o CMakeFiles/wumpus.dir/Users/taros/Documents/DE424MP/src/wumpus_model.cc.o -o wumpus  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/taros/Documents/DE424MP/emdw_de424/devel/emdw/build/src -Wl,-rpath,/Users/taros/bin ../libemdw.dylib /Users/taros/bin/libgLinear.dylib /Users/taros/bin/libprlite.dylib -llapack -lblas -lssl -lcrypto -lz
